pdg_node.informal_desc: Set up reconstruction loop parameters: compute the per-iteration reconstruction length from the shifting step and sampling rate, and initialize the reconstructed noise accumulator and remaining noise counter.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Scale the current clean PPG segment to zero-mean/unit-variance, then tile it into a 256-sample batch and convert to a FloatTensor ready for the generator.

declaration.name: normalize_and_batch_clean_segment

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_test: torch.FloatTensor, generator: nn.Module | callable, device: str | torch.device) -> np.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: Feed the batched clean segment through the pre-trained GAN generator on the target device and extract the first reconstructed noise waveform from the batch output.

pdg_node.statement: (noise_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: int | float) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Upsample both the reconstructed noise segment and the clean PPG segment, then detect systolic peaks in each using a minimum-distance criterion derived from the sampling rate.

declaration.name: detect_peaks_in_reconstructed_and_clean
declaration.type_signature: (noise_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: int | float) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray]
declaration.docstring: Upsample both the reconstructed noise segment and the clean PPG segment, then detect systolic peaks in each using a minimum-distance criterion derived from the sampling rate.

declaration.name: detect_peaks_in_reconstructed_and_clean
declaration.type_signature: (noise_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: int | float) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray]
declaration.docstring: Upsample both the reconstructed noise segment and the clean PPG segment, then detect systolic peaks in each using a minimum-distance criterion derived from the sampling rate.

declaration.name: detect_peaks_in_reconstructed_and_clean
declaration.type_signature: (noise_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, sampling_rate: int | float) -> tuple[np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray, np.ndarray]
declaration.docstring: Upsample both the reconstructed noise segment and the clean PPG segment, then detect systolic peaks in each using a minimum-distance criterion derived from the sampling rate.

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_resampled: np.ndarray, peaks_ppg: np.ndarray, noise_rec_res: np.ndarray, peaks_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, noise_rec: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: Concatenate the clean PPG up to its last detected peak with the reconstructed noise from its first detected peak onward, then downsample the stitched waveform back to the combined original-length sample count.

declaration.name: stitch_clean_and_reconstructed_waveforms
declaration.type_signature: (ppg_resampled: np.ndarray, peaks_ppg: np.ndarray, noise_rec_res: np.ndarray, peaks_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, noise_rec: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
declaration.docstring: Concatenate the clean PPG up to its last detected peak with the reconstructed noise from its first detected peak onward, then downsample the stitched waveform back to the combined original-length sample count.

declaration.name: stitch_clean_and_reconstructed_waveforms
declaration.type_signature: (ppg_resampled: np.ndarray, peaks_ppg: np.ndarray, noise_rec_res: np.ndarray, peaks_rec: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, noise_rec: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
declaration.docstring: Concatenate the clean PPG up to its last detected peak with the reconstructed noise from its first detected peak onward, then downsample the stitched waveform back to the combined original-length sample count.

declaration.name: stitch_clean_and_reconstructed_waveforms

declaration.docstring: Concatenate the clean PPG up to its last detected peak with the reconstructed noise from its first detected peak onward, then downsample the stitched waveform back to the combined original-length sample count.

pdg_node.statement: (ppg_and_rec_down: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, reconstructed_noise: list, remaining_noise: int, len_rec: int) -> tuple[list, int, np.ndarray]
pdg_node.informal_desc: Slice the downsampled stitched signal to extract the newly reconstructed noise portion (full step or remaining tail), append it to the accumulator, update the remaining noise counter, and advance the clean-segment window for the next iteration.

declaration.name: accumulate_reconstructed_noise_and_advance_window
declaration.type_signature: (ppg_and_rec_down: np.ndarray, ppg_clean: np.ndarray, reconstructed_noise: list, remaining_noise: int, len_rec: int) -> tuple[list, int, np.ndarray]
declaration.docstring: Slice the downsampled stitched signal to extract the newly reconstructed noise portion (full step or remaining tail), append it to the accumulator, update the remaining noise counter, and advance the clean-segment window for the next iteration.

declaration.docstring: Slice the downsampled stitched signal to extract the newly reconstructed noise portion (full step or remaining tail), append it to the accumulator, update the remaining noise counter, and advance the clean-segment window for the next iteration.
